channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Engine oil on pavement, 27th March
item.description:
There appears to be engine oil across the pavement outside Thurlow Towers, Knollys Road, extending for approximately 15 metres. It is very dangerous and presents a major slip hazard to anyone that walks on the pavement. It should be cleared immediately. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knollys Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste - fly tipped, 27th March
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitebeam Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding needs permanent fix, 27th March
item.description:
This part of Longlands outside 162 needs permanent fixing. The drains on the property need to be dug deeper as advised by a Thames water engineer. The road floods regularly and when it rains it becomes hazardous to pedestrians and drivers slong the legth of tge road for 100 yards or so. All the manholes on 162 grounds 4 or 5 of them need to be dropped by 300m from the surface and the pipework connecting all the drains needs to be 1.2 m deep to resolve the ongoing issue of flooding on the uneven road surfaces. As advised by on site Thames Water engineers. This is a seperate issue from the clean water issue that Thames water fixed permanently today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Longlands Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle parked in double yellow line, 27th March
item.description:
This car is parked in a yellow double line

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20,22, Mountfield Road, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cushion fly tippes, now lying in the street, 27th March
item.description:
What looks like a sofa cushion was fly tipped a couple of weeks ago and now is sitting in the middle of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Doddington Grove, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Trip Hazards, 27th March
item.description:
Outdide 150 and 154 there are a 2 trip hazards. This is used by a nesrby resident of Austral Close in a wheel chair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Longlands Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Austral slabs, 27th March
item.description:
From the side of 1 in Austral Close to 3 Austral close the pavement is very uneven. Making it difffor a resident wheelchair user

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Austral Close, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped black bin liners in the bracken. Looks like it might be connected to the fly tip just around the corner on the path which I've also reported

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calmont Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and rubbish blocking pavement, 27th March
item.description:
The footpath is completely blocked with furniture and rubbish. It is attracting pests and is an eyesore. This rubbish is being dumped by residents and is very annoying.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 27th March
item.description:
Someone has stumped a load of carpet. Underlay on the path between the millwall football training ground and the Ravensmead Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calmont Road, Downham, Greater London

item.title: Rocking paving slab, 27th March
item.description:
I saw 2 people trip over this in a number of hours. This is a busy road with 2 schools in walking distance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
